title: Smoky Beef Birria
description: A hearty and flavorful Mexican stew made with tender beef and a rich, smoky broth.
instructions: 2. In a large Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat. Sear the beef brisket until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
3. Add the onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the garlic, cumin, paprika, and salt to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add the chipotle peppers in adobo sauce to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the chicken broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
7. Return the beef brisket to the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
8. Braise the beef in the oven for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender.
9. Remove the pot from the oven and let the beef rest for 10 minutes.
10. Shred the beef with two forks and return it to the pot.
11. Stir in the chopped cilantro and lime juice.
12. Serve the birria hot, garnished with additional cilantro and lime wedges if desired.
